settings.heading: Compare the right EZQuest setup side by side
settings.copy: Narrow the right product by port mix, desk-versus-travel fit, charging needs, and the kind of workflow it serves best.
settings.support_note: Compare the options here first, then move into compatibility or support only when you need a deeper fit check.

settings.heading: Compare everyday hub, travel hub, and desk dock choices clearly
settings.copy: Use compare to choose between lighter travel expansion, balanced everyday connectivity, and a stronger desk-ready dock.

settings.title: USB-C Multimedia Hub
settings.copy: A balanced everyday hub for charging, HDMI, Ethernet, and accessory expansion at the desk or on the go.

settings.title: USB-C Travel Hub
settings.copy: Best when portability matters most and the setup needs light, dependable expansion for meetings, hotel desks, or classroom use.

settings.title: USB-C Pro Dock
settings.copy: A stronger fit for heavier desk setups that need more ports, displays, Ethernet, and permanent workspace stability.

settings.heading: Need help choosing between these options?
settings.copy: Move from comparison into support, compatibility, or direct help without losing the buying context.
